name: Chocolate-Caramel-Pecan Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine graham cracker crumbs and butter in a bowl. Stir well to mix.
2. Press the mixture evenly onto the bottom and 1 inch up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Unwrap the caramels and combine them with milk. Heat over low heat until melted, stirring often.
4. Pour the caramel mixture over the graham cracker crust. Sprinkle chopped pecans evenly over the caramel layer.
5. Beat cream cheese at high speed until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add sugar, mixing well after each addition.
7. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each egg is incorporated.
8. Stir in vanilla extract and chocolate morsels; beat until blended.
9. Spoon the mixture over the pecan layer.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
11. Remove from oven and run a knife around the edge of the pan to release the sides.
12. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack. Cover and chill at least 8 hours before serving.
13. Top with pecan halves and serve.
